# PPT Outline

## Slide 1

Title: Evidence-first PPT workflow
Message: Start with evidence before slide production.
Evidence source_ids: S1, S2, S3
Visual idea: Three-step workflow.
Speaker note: Explain why research and deck production are separated.

## Slide 2

Title: Audit before claims enter slides
Message: Claims need source IDs and caveats.
Evidence source_ids: S3, S4, S5
Visual idea: Claims matrix gate.
Speaker note: Emphasize traceability.
Footnote text: Sources: NIST, Stanford HAI, OECD.
